scripts.build: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && vite build && vite build --config vite.popup.config.ts && vite build --config vite.bg.config.ts && vite build --config vite.welcome.config.ts && node scripts/strip-localhost.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/add-localhost-e2e.mjs && playwright test --project=extension && node scripts/strip-localhost.mjs
